return(function(d,e,H,B,Y,G,c,I,f,b,l,S,T,E,i,x,W,z,D,h,o,Z,y,j)S,I,h,D,z,Z,l,f,y,b,j,W,T,x,i,E,o=function(d,N)local e=T(N)local H=function(H,B,Y)return o(d,{H,B,Y},N,e)end return H
